title: Why Can't Anyone Answer Questions About the Business? — Garrett Galow, WorkOS
summary: Garrett Galow from WorkOS presented Studio, an internal workspace that allows non-technical users to query Snowflake, Linear, and Notion using natural language. The LLM generates reusable, deterministic JavaScript widgets that call data sources directly, with reliability ensured through preflight sequencing, schema context layering, and query validation.
writeup: Garrett Galow of WorkOS describes Studio, an internal workspace that lets non-technical users ask business questions in natural language against Snowflake, Linear, and Notion. The system answers by generating reusable widgets written as declarative JavaScript that call the data sources directly, so repeat runs become deterministic and cheap rather than fresh LLM generations. The result removes the need to file engineering requests for routine business queries.
